title: eleogiton scabra
intro: Eleogiton scabra, also known as rough elephant ear, is a plant species that belongs to the water-plantain family (Alismataceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eleogiton scabra include treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as relieving digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying and infusing the leaves, which can then be consumed as a tea or used in topical creams and ointments.
